title: Static Pods — Mirror Pods
text:
The kubelet automatically tries to create a
mirror Pod
on the Kubernetes API server for each static Pod.
This means that the Pods running on a node are visible on the API server,
but cannot be controlled from there.
The Pod names will be suffixed with the node hostname with a leading hyphen.
The kubelet propagates
labels
from the static Pod to the mirror Pod. You can use those labels as normal via
selectors
.
If you try to use
kubectl
to delete the mirror Pod from the API server,
the kubelet
does not
remove the static Pod. The kubelet will recreate
the mirror Pod.
